tutorial: Welcome to Unilearn! I’m Apollo, your AI assistant, and I respond to voice commands. Tap the arrow below to open the menu. The game revolves around cards in the Planet Cards tab, where you can search and filter celestial bodies. If your search doesn’t exist, tap the plus button to create it. Cards contain stats and quizzes for levelling up, and can be added to the simulation. Change simulation settings in Galaxy Console, or try Multiplayer. Your mission is to explore, discover, and unlock every achievement. That’s everything you need to begin. Now go explore the universe—and I’ll be here whenever you need me!
